code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of (subject, predicate, object) triples about a comics character
    into a single fluent English sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Templates for each predicate
    templates = {
        "alternativeName": "{subject} is also known as {object}",
        "creator": "{subject} was created by {object}",
        "fullName": "{subject}'s full name is {object}",
        "foundedBy": "{subject} was founded by {object}",
        "keyPerson": "{subject} has key person {object}",
        "city": "{subject} is based in {object}",
        "product": "{subject} produces {object}",
        "lastAired": "{subject} last aired on {object}",
        "starring": "{subject} starred {object}",
        "firstAppearanceInFilm": "{subject} first appeared in the film {object}",
        "voice": "{subject} is voiced by {object}",
        "distributor": "{subject} was distributed by {object}",
        "birthPlace": "{subject} was born in {object}",
        "nationality": "{subject} is from {object}",
        "award": "{subject} received the {object}",
        "broadcastedBy": "{subject} was broadcasted by {object}",
        "firstAired": "{subject} first aired on {object}",
        "series": "{subject} belongs to the series {object}",
        "child": "{subject} has a child named {object}",
    }

    # Group objects by subject and predicate
    grouped = {}
    for t in triples:
        grouped.setdefault(t.subject, {}).setdefault(t.predicate, []).append(t.object)

    # Build clause for each subject
    subject_clauses = []
    for subject, pred_dict in grouped.items():
        parts = []
        for pred, objects in pred_dict.items():
            tmpl = templates.get(pred, "{subject} {predicate} {object}")
            # join multiple objects with 'and'
            if len(objects) > 1:
                obj_str = " and ".join(objects)
            else:
                obj_str = objects[0]
            part = tmpl.format(subject=subject, predicate=pred, object=obj_str)
            parts.append(part)
        # combine parts for the same subject
        if len(parts) == 1:
            subject_clause = parts[0]
        else:
            subject_clause = ", ".join(parts[:-1]) + ", and " + parts[-1]
        subject_clauses.append(subject_clause)

    # Combine all subject clauses into one sentence
    if len(subject_clauses) == 1:
        sentence = subject_clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(subject_clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + subject_clauses[-1] + "."
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
